title: Segfault during query involving LEFT JOIN column in the ORDER BY clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a Int32, b String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
CREATE TABLE t2(b Int32, c String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY b;
SELECT DISTINCT a FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON a = b ORDER BY isNull(c);
key_bug_features: Segfault during LEFT JOIN with ORDER BY clause
